meta-description: Learn about high-cost excise taxes by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: High-cost excise tax
excerpt: Under the Affordable Care Act starting in 2018, a tax on insurance companies that provide high-cost plans. This tax encourages streamlining of health plans to make premiums more affordable.
content: Under the Affordable Care Act starting in 2018, a tax on insurance companies that provide high-cost plans. This tax encourages streamlining of health plans to make premiums more affordable.
